title: 8 Things a Man of God Does With His Single Season
caption:
God didn't give you a single season so you could wait.

He gave it to you so you could become the man worth trusting with the next thing.

Open your Bible before the apps. Ask the older man the question you're afraid to ask. Kill the compromise you'd have to confess before the altar. Build something. Tend your body. Learn to sit with yourself.

Pray for the woman you haven't met yet. Not "give her to me" — "make me ready."

Your life didn't start when someone chose you. It started when God did.

Save this for the brother who thinks he's waiting for his real life to begin.

#faith #christianmen #singleness #godlymen #manofgod #thework #formation #scripture #christianity
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
